english: to dive / to scuba dive / to submerge
notes: Uses 'sein' in Perfekt (movement verb). Can also mean 'to dip' (hat getaucht) in non-movement sense.

sentences.german: Sie taucht regelmäßig im Roten Meer.
sentences.english: She dives regularly in the Red Sea.

sentences.german: Wir sind letzten Sommer in Thailand getaucht.
sentences.english: We went scuba diving in Thailand last summer.

cloze_sentences.english: She dives regularly in the Red Sea.

cloze_sentences.text: Wir sind letzten Sommer in Thailand {{c1::getaucht}}.
cloze_sentences.english: We went scuba diving in Thailand last summer.
The diver dove deep into the sea.
